## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Documentation reflects changed behavior or trust boundaries
- [ ] No secrets, customer data, or sensitive model output are included
